name: [TEMPLATE] DT Ingest — NASA FIRMS fires / thermal anomalies

meta.templateNote: Template/spec only — import into n8n, attach your own Postgres credential AND a FIRMS MAP_KEY credential, then activate. The MAP_KEY placeholder below must be replaced inside n8n; never commit a real key to this repository.

parameters.content:
TEMPLATE — NASA FIRMS fire ingestion

1. Runs every 3 hours (FIRMS data is not minute-fresh; respect their access policy and rate limits).
2. Requires a free FIRMS MAP_KEY (https://firms.modaps.eosdis.nasa.gov/api/). Store it as an n8n credential / expression — the {{FIRMS_MAP_KEY}} placeholder in the URL is intentionally invalid so the template cannot run unconfigured.
3. Queries the area API for the regional bbox (CSV response), parses rows, and upserts observations keyed by satellite+coords+acquisition time.
4. If FIRMS is unavailable or rate-limits (HTTP 429), the run closes as 'error' and the publish workflow marks the source 'stale'/'error' — the layer keeps its last good data with an honest freshness badge. Never fabricate hotspots.

Delta del Paraná wetland fires are the key regional use case for this layer.

postgres.name: REPLACE WITH YOUR LOCAL POSTGRES CREDENTIAL

nodes.name: Fetch FIRMS area CSV
nodes.notes: Replace {{FIRMS_MAP_KEY}} with an n8n expression reading your own credential. bbox order for FIRMS area API: west,south,east,north; trailing /1 = last 1 day.
